title: Academic introduction exemplar
english: Writing high-quality research papers requires more than sentence-level fluency. Authors must preserve technical meaning, maintain consistent terminology, and present their contributions in a style that matches the expectations of the target venue. These requirements are especially challenging when a manuscript starts from a Chinese draft and must be converted into an English LaTeX paper. A practical writing assistant should therefore combine translation, retrieval, and structured project memory rather than treating each paragraph as an isolated input.
style_notes: Begin with a broad motivation that readers can recognize.
Narrow the discussion toward the concrete writing problem.
Explain why the problem is difficult in realistic workflows.
End by motivating the need for the proposed system.
